title: Savory Smoky Argentinian Potatoes Grill
description: A mustardy, cheese-pull, satvik-friendly Argentinian dish featuring baby new potatoes, perfect for a sick day, with a smoky flavor from the grill.
instructions: Preheat the grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the halved baby new potatoes to the bowl and toss to coat with the oil mixture.
Grill the potatoes for 20 minutes, or until they are tender and lightly charred.
In a small bowl, whisk together whole grain mustard and lemon juice.
Brush the mustard mixture onto the grilled potatoes.
Sprinkle the shredded provolone cheese over the potatoes.
Return the potatoes to the grill and cook for an additional 2 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the potatoes from the grill and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley.
Serve the Savory Smoky Argentinian Potatoes Grill hot and enjoy.
